text: I feel quietly curious, almost like a visitor in a laboratory of ideas. The glass room suggests transparency and collaboration—people gathered in conversation, perhaps problem-solving. Moving into the R+D space, I sense the hum of innovation: bold colors, new technologies, and a celebration of exploration. It awakens within me the philosophical question of how human intention steers progress and how knowledge is cultivated in spaces like these. I feel inspired but also contemplative, aware of the fragile yet potent dance between creativity and discipline.
